data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for lead source provenance for follow-up teams. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific information or endpoints that demonstrate the implementation of this requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for lead source provenance, but there is no evidence confirming its existence or functionality, indicating a clear gap in the implementation.
gaps: No evidence of lead source provenance for follow-up teams.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
